intended_use: AIR™ Recon DL is a deep learning based reconstruction technique that is available for use on GE Healthcare 1.5T, 3.0T, and 7.0T MR systems. AIR Recon DL reduces noise and ringing (truncation artifacts
intended_use_full: AIR™ Recon DL is a deep learning based reconstruction technique that is available for use on GE Healthcare 1.5T, 3.0T, and 7.0T MR systems. AIR Recon DL reduces noise and ringing (truncation artifacts) in MR images, which can be used to reduce scan time and improve image quality. AIR Recon DL is intended for use with all anatomies, and for patients of all ages. Depending on the anatomy of interest being imaged, contrast agents may be used.
ground_truth: Conventional MR images reconstructed from the same acquired raw data; quantitative measurements from conventional images for comparison of contrast pharmacokinetics, lesion sizes, and brain volumetry
other_metrics: Signal-to-noise ratio improvement (133/133 cases equivalent or better); sharpness improvement (133/133 cases equivalent or better); lesion conspicuity (123/124 cases with pathology equivalent or better); radiologist preference for AIR Recon DL images in 99% of evaluations; agreement between measurements using conventional and AIR Recon DL images described as 'strong agreement'
